case_title: 1635 -10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. RONALD MOORE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY 1635 -10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR; AT THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THIS MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT--UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
MOTION TO TRANSFER DECLARATIONS, P&A'S, JUDICIAL NOTICE AND POS FILED BY DEPONENT MOORE, RONALD HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO TRANSFER FILED BY RONALD MOORE IS GRANTED. AT THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00) SERVED DEC-31-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, RONALD
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
